pi_items.source: task.json metadata (line 18), docker-compose.yml port mapping (line 7), docker-compose.yml PUBLIC_URL (line 25), setup_jitsi.sh (line 78), env.json

privileged_info_summary: The task involves using the invite/share feature in Jitsi Meet to copy a meeting invitation link to the clipboard. The test is conducted in a meeting room named 'DesignReview' running on Jitsi Meet deployed locally at http://localhost:8080 via Docker using stable-9753 images. Both the room name and URL are synthetic test data used for UI/interaction testing purposes.
